entries.definition:
dh–b–b flies, bees, ‘fly-whisk’, swatter, to chase away; to
325                                     ذ/ب/ب

become emaciated; tip or point of a blade. Of this root, only ذُبَاب dhubāb occurs twice in the Qur’an.

ذُبَاب dhubāb [coll. n.] flies, insignificant things (22:73) إِنَّ الَّذِينَ تَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِ اللَّهِ لَن يَخْلُقُوا ذُبَابًا وَلَوِ اجْتَمَعُوا لَهُ those upon whom you call, beside God, cannot create [even] a fly—even if they gathered together to do it.
